doc.title: Plugins
doc.content:
Wakamiti does not include built-in steps; they are provided through plugins. The following plugins are currently available, and you can also develop your own!

  • REST steps
  • Database steps
  • AMQP steps
  • HTML report
  • Cucumber report
  • File Uploader
  • Appium steps
  • Azure Integration
  • XRay Integration
  • Email steps
  • JMeter steps
  • Groovy
  • Modbus steps
  • JaCoCo report
